allow: Bash(python -c "import zipfile,re,sys; z=zipfile.ZipFile\('vulnforce-claude-input.docx'\); d=z.read\('word/document.xml'\).decode\('utf-8','ignore'\); import re; txt=re.sub\(r'<w:p[ >]', '\\n', d\); txt=re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','',txt\); import html; print\(html.unescape\(txt\)\)")
Bash(python -m vulnforge scan --path examples/sample-vuln-app --description examples/app-description.yaml --out runs/sample --sast semgrep,gitleaks --timeout 540)
Bash(python -m vulnforge scan --path examples/sample-vuln-app --description examples/app-description.yaml --out runs/sample --authorized --timeout 540)

Bash(python -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('runs/sample/findings.json'\)\);f=[x for x in d['findings'] if x['source']=='gitleaks'][0];print\('title:',f['title']\);print\('evidence:',f['evidence']\)")
Bash(python -m vulnforge scan --path examples/sample-vuln-app --description examples/app-description.yaml --out runs/sample --authorized --ai none --timeout 300)

Bash(python -c "import json;m=json.load\(open\('runs/sample/run.json'\)\);[print\(f\\"  {s['name']:<10} {s['state']:<8} findings={s['findings']}\\"\) for s in m['stages']];print\('  authorized:',m['authorized'],'| mode:',m['scan_mode'],'| stack:',m['detected_stack']\)")

Bash(python -m vulnforge scan --path examples/sample-vuln-app --url https://example.com --description examples/app-description.yaml --out runs/dast-demo --dast headers --sast "" --authorized --timeout 60)

Bash(python -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('runs/dast-demo/findings.json'\)\);[print\(f\\"{f['severity']:<8} {f['source']:<9} {f['category']:<10} {f['title'][:58]}\\"\) for f in d['findings'] if f['engine']=='dast']")
